title: The Unfinished Story
content: Inside a secondhand bookstore, Chloe purchased an old novel that contained several handwritten pages tucked between the chapters. The pages described an original mystery story, but the final chapter was missing. Curious, she searched online and eventually contacted the family of the former owner. They explained that the manuscript had been written by their grandfather, who never finished it before his death. Inspired by the discovery, the family decided to preserve the remaining pages. Although the mystery remained unresolved, the unfinished story gained a meaningful new ending through those who remembered its author.
